overall.description: A cinematic scene from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy) showing students in wizard robes practicing spellcasting in an outdoor wooden classroom pavilion. The camera remains stationary, capturing the timber-framed structure with a forest meadow visible in the background as students cast glowing spells and move about the stone-paved area.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor magical classroom pavilion with timber framing

events.description: student in center foreground casts a spell with visible magical glow and wand movement
additional student enters the pavilion from the left side, increasing crowd density

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the classroom scene from a fixed vantage point near the students

notable_agents.action: student practicing wand movements and casting glowing spells at the central wooden table
student walking into the pavilion from the left, approaching the group

entered.detail: rustic wooden beam structure forming the roof and supports of the open-air classroom
sturdy dark wooden desks where students stand and practice spells
light-colored stone tile flooring covering the pavilion ground
lush green grass and tall trees visible through the open sides of the pavilion
dark wooden cabinet against the back wall beneath a circular emblem

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a sunlit outdoor classroom pavilion with heavy timber framing and stone flooring. Several students in dark wizard robes stand scattered around wooden tables, practicing spellcasting. The camera remains fixed as magical glows appear from wand movements in the center, and a late student enters from the left side, walking toward the group. A forest meadow is visible in the background through the open archways.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a static, sunlit view of an outdoor classroom pavilion where students engage in magical practice. It begins with a wide look at the heavy timber framing and stone flooring, focusing on students in dark robes scattered around wooden tables. As the scene unfolds, magical glows ignite in the center of the space from rhythmic wand movements, while a late student enters from the left to join the group. The perspective remains fixed, allowing the activity to play out against the backdrop of a lush forest meadow visible through the open archways.
